reviews.review_description: How do you even play?? U just fly from one vent to another, there's nothing to do and no instructions whatsoever

developer_response.body: Could you elaborate? I have not had any reports of this. I will try to assist. Please reach via email at support@thirdlifegames.com

reviews.review_description: Ok hear me out. Despite not being finished yet, I can see where they are going with this. You can tell there is some polish there but things still need some work. Just being able to fly around is awesome. I feel the Descent vibes. The gameplay is smooth. The developers are actively working on the game and are very responsive to player feedback, which is always a plus. I can't wait to see what the finished product will be like, but even in its current state, I like it to just fly around a bit. When more players start playing I’m sure it will be even more fun. I know it still has a way to go but I’m keeping an eye on this one!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words. We are hoping to have everything in a great playable base state within the next couple of weeks. Stay tuned!
